plugins.name: files-organizer
plugins.description: Scan Mac file systems, find duplicates, analyze folder structure, detect orphan files, and generate interactive HTML dashboards with reorganization recommendations.

plugins.name: project-health
plugins.description: Deep audit any code repository with a score out of 100 across 9 categories: git health, structure, code quality, config, database, docs, testing, dependencies, and security.

plugins.name: human-writing
plugins.description: Write outward-facing prose that reads like a person wrote it, and strip AI tells from existing drafts. Drafting guidance plus a /humanize rewrite pass.
